name: Cloudreve
tagline: A self-hosted file management and sharing system.
description:
A self-hosted file management and sharing system.

Docs: https://docs.cloudreve.org/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  cloudreve:
    image: cloudreve/cloudreve:4.10.1
    environment:
      - CR_CONF_Database.Type=postgres
      - CR_CONF_Database.Host=postgres
      - CR_CONF_Database.User=ubba7c78823
      - CR_CONF_Database.Password=5d2c256e3c31a7727f2f103d8ac2a095
      - CR_CONF_Database.Name=${POSTGRES_DB:-cloudreve-db}
      - CR_CONF_Database.Port=5432
      - CR_CONF_Redis.Server=redis:6379
      - CR_CONF_Redis.Password=24b2fd8e0bc53d8889ae34418acca543
    volumes:
      - cloudreve-data:/cloudreve/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - nc
        - -z
        - localhost
        - '5212'
      interval: 20s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42015:5212
  postgres:
    image: postgres:18-alpine
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=ubba7c78823
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=5d2c256e3c31a7727f2f103d8ac2a095
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-cloudreve-db}
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv15ab8604} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-cloudreve}
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --requirepass 24b2fd8e0bc53d8889ae34418acca543
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - redis-cli
        - -a
        - 24b2fd8e0bc53d8889ae34418acca543
        - ping
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  cloudreve-data: null
  postgres-data: null
  redis-data: null
